overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a futuristic urban environment (Cyberpunk 2077), showing a character walking through a sunlit plaza, ascending a wide staircase, crossing a busy intersection with towering glass skyscrapers, and entering a covered pedestrian walkway. The scene features bright natural lighting, futuristic vehicles, and dense cyberpunk architecture.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the open plaza toward a wide staircase between buildings

entered.detail: large red concrete building wall with geometric panels
large illuminated billboards featuring cartoon character advertisements
wide white stone staircase leading up between buildings
large olive trees in white rectangular planters

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a sunlit urban plaza with a red building facade on the left featuring large advertising billboards. The camera walks forward on paved tiles toward a wide concrete staircase in the distance, flanked by potted trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: wide public staircase with white stone steps

events.description: begins ascending the wide staircase toward the upper level

agents.ego_description: climbing the staircase steps while approaching the top

notable_agents.action: character in purple and blue outfit with cybernetic enhancements descending the stairs

entered.detail: tall modern building with reflective blue glass windows

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends the wide white staircase, passing a character in purple descending toward the camera. The advertising billboards fall behind as a massive glass skyscraper tower comes into view on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy futuristic intersection with colorful crosswalk and elevated highway

events.description: exits staircase and enters open urban intersection with tall skyscrapers
futuristic vehicles drive through the colorful intersection

agents.ego_description: reaching the top of stairs, looking around the intersection, then turning right toward a covered walkway

notable_agents.action: futuristic silver car driving through the intersection
pedestrian with red hat and beige coat waiting at the crosswalk edge

entered.detail: multi-level highway structure crossing between buildings with digital signage
tropical palm trees lining the street median
zebra crossing painted in bright yellow, red, and blue stripes
large electronic displays with purple and pink neon advertisements
tall modern street light with orange fixture

segments.scene_description: At the top of the stairs, the scene opens into a bright futuristic intersection dominated by a massive glass skyscraper. The camera turns right, revealing an elevated highway overpass, palm trees, and a colorful crosswalk with futuristic vehicles driving through. Pedestrians wait at the crosswalk edges.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with wooden beam ceiling

events.description: enters covered walkway from the open sunlit street
lighting becomes noticeably darker and more shadowed under the covered structure

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered pedestrian corridor alongside other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking ahead in the same direction

entered.detail: long covered pedestrian passage with overhead protection
overhead structure with exposed wooden beams and gaps allowing light through
illuminated red and blue vending machine against the wall
tall gray concrete wall of adjacent building
long yellow wooden barriers separating walkway from road

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a long covered pedestrian walkway with a distinctive wooden beam ceiling that creates patterns of light and shadow. The environment shifts from bright sunlight to mixed lighting. The camera walks past a red vending machine and yellow wooden barriers while following other pedestrians through the corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a bright, open urban plaza into a shaded pedestrian corridor. It begins by moving across paved tiles past a red building facade with large advertising billboards, heading toward a wide concrete staircase flanked by potted trees. As the camera ascends the white stairs and passes a descending character in purple, the billboards recede and a massive glass skyscraper tower emerges on the right. The scene then opens into a sunlit futuristic intersection where the camera turns right to reveal an elevated highway overpass, palm trees, and vehicles crossing a colorful crosswalk. Finally, the environment shifts from bright sunlight to mixed lighting as the camera enters a long covered walkway, passing a red vending machine and yellow barriers beneath a wooden beam ceiling.
